title: May 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 31''' is the 151st day (152nd in leap years) of the year, with 214 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox]] is founded.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 17|''Star Wars Weekly'' 17]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Richard Riddell]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 154|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 154]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 5|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 5]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Insider 94|''Star Wars Insider'' 94]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Death Star Battles]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.34]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 7|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 7]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Michael Ford]] dies.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge]] opens in [[Disneyland]].
*2019 – "[[Luke vs. the Rancor - Wrath of the Rancor]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Boxed Set]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: I Am Your Father]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 32|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 32]] published.
*2023 – [[Sana Starros 4|''Sana Starros'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 5|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 5]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: The Bad Batch (junior novelization)|''Star Wars: The Bad Batch'' junior novelization]] published in France.
